name: Privilege Escalation
description: Detects privilege escalation including special privilege assignment, token privilege adjustment, and UAC elevation. Key: 4672 with SeDebugPrivilege or SeTcbPrivilege indicates admin-level access.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

event_descriptions.4672: Special privileges assigned to new logon — check PrivilegeList field for dangerous privileges
event_descriptions.4703: Token right adjusted (enabled/disabled privilege — UAC bypass indicator)
